title: Bed SpawnPoint
description: Adds the respawn point confirmation message from Minecraft 1.16 to older versions
body:
Bed Spawn Point is a small quality-of-life mod that backports a feature introduced in Minecraft 1.16:
when you right-click your bed, the game will notify you with a message saying “Respawn point set.”

This feature did not exist in earlier versions of the game, so this mod brings it to versions 1.10.2 through 1.12.2.

Features

Adds the respawn point confirmation message when interacting with a bed.

Works exactly like in Minecraft 1.16 and later versions.

How it improves gameplay

Gives players clarity and peace of mind knowing their spawn point is correctly set.

Prevents confusion or mistakes when exploring, fighting, or preparing for long journeys.

Note: In single player mode the mod works independently, on servers only the server needs the file and not the players.
